one_time_description: Settlement proceeds of $844,120 recorded as revenue in 2023 (non-recurring)
economic_notes: Nation operates oil and gas enterprises (White Bear Oil and Gas Enterprise, White Bear Oil and Gas Ltd., Wabimusqua Oil and Gas Ltd., Wabimusqua Oil and Gas Limited Partnership), industrial works (White Bear Industrial Works Ltd., White Bear Industrial Works Limited Partnership), a lake resort (White Bear Lake Resort Inc.), golf course (White Bear Lake Golf Course Inc.), and a holdings company (White Bear Holdings Ltd.). Bear Claw Community Development Incorporated distributes proceeds from Dakota Dunes, Painted Hand, and Living Skies casinos. Funds in suspense ($8,704,859) related to disputed northern boundary oil lands.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Province is Saskatchewan (SK), located in Treaty 4 Territory. Nation adopted PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations effective April 1, 2022, recognizing a new liability of $2,583,731 which increased expenses by $484,196 and capitalized $2,099,535 to TCA — this is a significant non-cash accounting change. Seven entities consolidated including oil & gas and industrial works partnerships. Three GBEs (White Bear Lake Resort Inc., White Bear Lake Golf Course Inc., White Bear Holdings Ltd.) accounted for using modified equity method. $8,704,859 held in suspense at Ottawa Trust Fund relating to disputed northern boundary oil lands — Nation does not have access to these funds. Settlement proceeds of $844,120 represent a one-time non-recurring item. No schedule of remuneration was included in the extracted text. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + FNIH + SITAG + CMHC + FSIN = 12,257,735 + 4,358,246 + 339,326 + 296,761 + 718,181 = 17,970,249; osr = 22,242,073 - 17,970,249 = 4,271,824.
